name: TestRegister_RoutesRequireAuthentication
description: TestRegister_RoutesRequireAuthentication dispatches real requests through the wiredrouter to verify that the registered routes are guarded by authentication middleware.The handlers themselves trust the middleware to enforce this contract; if the routewireup ever loses RequirePermissions/RequireAuth, this test will fail.
descriptionHtml: TestRegister_RoutesRequireAuthentication dispatches real requests through the wiredrouter to verify that the registered routes are guarded by authentication middleware.The handlers themselves trust the middleware to enforce this contract; if the routewireup ever loses RequirePermissions/RequireAuth, this test will fail.
